member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Cache.DiskCacheManager
member.summary: Manages a disk cache for pre-optimized and pre-compressed assets. Cache lives under {CachePath}/jellyshim/ and never modifies original files.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Cache.DiskCacheManager.#ctor(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Cache.DiskCacheManager})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Cache.DiskCacheManager.CacheRoot
member.summary: Gets the root cache directory.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Cache.DiskCacheManager.GetCachedFilePath(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the full path to a cached file for a given relative path and encoding. Path traversal is prevented by rejecting segments containing "..".

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Cache.DiskCacheManager.IsCacheValid(System.String,System.String,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Checks whether a cached version exists and is still valid (source hasn't been modified since cache was built).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Cache.DiskCacheManager.TryGetCachedFile(System.String,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to get a cached file's full path. Returns false if not cached or stale.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Cache.DiskCacheManager.Store(System.String,System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Stores content in the cache.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Cache.DiskCacheManager.StoreAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stores content in the cache asynchronously.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Cache.DiskCacheManager.ComputeETag(System.String)
member.summary: Computes an ETag for a cached file based on its content hash. Results are cached in memory and invalidated when the file's last-write time changes.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Cache.DiskCacheManager.InvalidateAll
member.summary: Invalidates the entire cache.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Cache.DiskCacheManager.GetCacheStats
member.summary: Gets total cached files count and size.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Plugin configuration for JellyShim.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableMinification
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether JS/CSS minification is enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableCompression
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Brotli/Gzip pre-compression is enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.BrotliCompressionLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets the Brotli compression level (0-11). 11 is max compression.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableFileTransformationIntegration
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether File Transformation plugin integration is enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableCacheHeaders
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether optimal cache headers are added.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.HashedAssetMaxAge
member.summary: Gets or sets max-age for hashed assets (seconds). Default: 1 year.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.StaticAssetMaxAge
member.summary: Gets or sets max-age for general static assets (seconds). Default: 30 days.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.PluginAssetMaxAge
member.summary: Gets or sets max-age for plugin assets (seconds). Default: 1 day.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.StaleWhileRevalidate
member.summary: Gets or sets stale-while-revalidate for static assets (seconds). Default: 1 day.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ImageCacheMaxAge
member.summary: Gets or sets max-age for image responses (seconds). Default: 30 days.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ImageStaleWhileRevalidate
member.summary: Gets or sets stale-while-revalidate for images (seconds). Default: 7 days.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnablePreloadInjection
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether modulepreload link injection is enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableScriptDefer
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether script defer optimization is enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.StripSriOnModification
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether SRI integrity attributes should be stripped.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnablePreconnectHints
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether preconnect hints are injected into HTML.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.PreconnectOrigins
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of origins for preconnect hints (one per line).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableFontPreloadHeaders
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Link headers for fonts are added (preload).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableJsModulepreloadHeaders
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Link headers for JS are added (modulepreload).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableCrossOriginResourcePolicy
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy header is added.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.CrossOriginResourcePolicyValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the CORP value. Default: cross-origin (for iframe Jellyseerr compat).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableSecurityHeaders
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether security headers are enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.XContentTypeOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets X-Content-Type-Options value.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ReferrerPolicy
member.summary: Gets or sets Referrer-Policy value.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.PermissionsPolicy
member.summary: Gets or sets Permissions-Policy value.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableImageOptimization
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether native image optimization is enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ImageOutputFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets the preferred output format (webp, jpeg, or auto).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableImageCache
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether processed images are cached to disk.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.PrimaryMaxWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the max width for Primary images (poster, cover art).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.PrimaryQuality
member.summary: Gets or sets the quality for Primary images (1-100).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.BackdropMaxWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the max width for Backdrop images (background art).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.BackdropQuality
member.summary: Gets or sets the quality for Backdrop images (1-100).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ArtMaxWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the max width for Art images (fan art, clear art).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ArtQuality
member.summary: Gets or sets the quality for Art images (1-100).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.BannerMaxWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the max width for Banner images.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.BannerQuality
member.summary: Gets or sets the quality for Banner images (1-100).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.LogoMaxWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the max width for Logo images (transparent).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.LogoQuality
member.summary: Gets or sets the quality for Logo images (1-100).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ThumbMaxWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the max width for Thumb images (thumbnails).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ThumbQuality
member.summary: Gets or sets the quality for Thumb images (1-100).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ScreenshotMaxWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the max width for Screenshot images.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ScreenshotQuality
member.summary: Gets or sets the quality for Screenshot images (1-100).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ChapterMaxWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the max width for Chapter images.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ChapterQuality
member.summary: Gets or sets the quality for Chapter images (1-100).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ProfileMaxWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the max width for Profile images (user pictures).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ProfileQuality
member.summary: Gets or sets the quality for Profile images (1-100).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.DiscMaxWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the max width for Disc images (CD/DVD art).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.DiscQuality
member.summary: Gets or sets the quality for Disc images (1-100).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.BoxMaxWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the max width for Box images (box art).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.BoxQuality
member.summary: Gets or sets the quality for Box images (1-100).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.BoxRearMaxWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the max width for BoxRear images (rear box art).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.BoxRearQuality
member.summary: Gets or sets the quality for BoxRear images (1-100).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.DefaultImageMaxWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the max width for unrecognized image types (fallback).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.DefaultImageQuality
member.summary: Gets or sets the quality for unrecognized image types (fallback, 1-100).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.PluginAssetPaths
member.summary: Gets or sets known plugin static asset path prefixes (one per line). These paths get plugin-level caching + compression.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.AssetOptimizationMiddleware
member.summary: ASP.NET Core middleware that intercepts requests to /web/* and plugin static paths, serving pre-compressed cached assets with Cache-Control, ETag, Vary, CORP, Link preload, and security headers.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.AssetOptimizationMiddleware.ApiPrefixes
member.summary: API-like path prefixes that should NEVER be cached. Jellyfin doesn't route everything under /api/ — most endpoints are at root level.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.AssetOptimizationMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Cache.DiskCacheManager,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.AssetOptimizationMiddleware})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.AssetOptimizationMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Processes the request.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.AssetOptimizationMiddleware.IsPluginAssetPath(System.String,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Checks if a path matches one of the configured plugin static asset prefixes. Parsed paths are cached to avoid re-splitting on every request.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.AssetOptimizationMiddleware.IsApiPath(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a path is an API/dynamic endpoint that should NEVER be cached.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.AssetOptimizationMiddleware.SetResponseHeaders(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration,System.Action)
member.summary: Sets CORP, security headers, and a custom action via OnStarting callback for responses that pass through to the next middleware.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.AssetOptimizationMiddleware.SetCacheHeaders(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpResponse,System.String,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Determines appropriate cache policy based on the file path.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.AssetOptimizationMiddleware.SetPassthroughCacheHeaders(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpResponse,System.String,System.Boolean,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Sets cache headers for pass-through (non-cached) responses.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.AssetOptimizationMiddleware.AddSecurityHeaders(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpResponse,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Adds security headers if enabled in config.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.AssetOptimizationMiddleware.IsHashedAsset(System.String)
member.summary: Heuristic: files with a content hash segment (8+ hex chars) in their name.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.ImageOptimizationMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware that intercepts Jellyfin image requests and processes them natively using ImageSharp for on-the-fly resizing, quality reduction, and format conversion. No external service required — all processing happens in-process.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.ImageOptimizationMiddleware.ImagePathRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^/(Items|Users)/[^/]+/Images/([^/?]+)
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase | RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match '/'.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match an empty string.
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match an empty string.
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match '/'.
○ Match a character other than '/' atomically at least once.
○ Match '/'.
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Gg].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match '/'.
○ 2nd capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [^/?] atomically at least once.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.ImageOptimizationMiddleware.MaxCaptureBytes
member.summary: Maximum original image size we'll attempt to process (50 MB).
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.ImageOptimizationMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Processes the request.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.ImageOptimizationMiddleware.ServeCachedImage(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,System.String,System.String,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Serves a cached processed image file with ETag/304 support.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.ImageOptimizationMiddleware.SetImageHeaders(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpResponse,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Sets cache and CORP headers for image responses.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.ImageOptimizationMiddleware.GetImageSettings(System.String,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Retrieves per-type MaxWidth and Quality from configuration. Each Jellyfin image type has its own independent settings.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.ImageOptimizationMiddleware.NegotiateFormat(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Selects output format based on Accept header and config preference. Supports WebP and JPEG output.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.ImageOptimizationMiddleware.BuildCacheKey(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Builds a deterministic cache key from request path and processing parameters.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Middleware.JellyShimStartupFilter
member.summary: Injects JellyShim middlewares into the Jellyfin HTTP pipeline via the mechanism. This runs before Jellyfin's own static file middleware so we can intercept and serve cached/compressed assets.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.AssetProcessor
member.summary: Orchestrates the full asset optimization pipeline: scan WebPath → minify (JS/CSS) → transform (HTML) → pre-compress (Brotli/Gzip) → store in disk cache.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.AssetProcessor.ProcessAllAsync(System.String,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Processes all compressible assets in the given web path.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.AssetProcessor.ProcessingStats
member.summary: Statistics from a processing run.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.AssetProcessor.ProcessingStats.Processed
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of files processed.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.AssetProcessor.ProcessingStats.Skipped
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of files skipped (cache valid).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.AssetProcessor.ProcessingStats.Errors
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of files that failed.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.AssetProcessor.ProcessingStats.TotalOriginalBytes
member.summary: Gets or sets the total original bytes before optimization.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.AssetProcessor.ProcessingStats.TotalBrotliBytes
member.summary: Gets or sets the total Brotli compressed bytes.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.AssetProcessor.ProcessingStats.TotalGzipBytes
member.summary: Gets or sets the total Gzip compressed bytes.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.AssetProcessor.ProcessingStats.ElapsedMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the elapsed time in milliseconds.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.ImageProcessor
member.summary: Native image processor using ImageSharp — resizes, re-encodes, and compresses images without any external service dependency.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.ImageProcessor.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.ImageProcessor})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.ImageProcessor.Process(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Processes an image: resize to max width (preserving aspect ratio) and re-encode. Only downscales — images already smaller than maxWidth are not upscaled.
member.param: Maximum output width in pixels. 0 = no resize.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.ImageProcessor.GetContentType(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the MIME content type for the given format.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.PreCompressor
member.summary: Pre-compresses content using Brotli and Gzip at build time.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.PreCompressor.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.PreCompressor})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.PreCompressor.CompressBrotli(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Compresses data with Brotli at the specified quality level.
member.param: Brotli quality level (0-11). Default 11 for max compression.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.PreCompressor.CompressBrotliAsync(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Compresses data with Brotli asynchronously.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.PreCompressor.CompressGzip(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Compresses data with Gzip at optimal level.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.PreCompressor.CompressGzipAsync(System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Compresses data with Gzip asynchronously.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Optimization.PreCompressor.CompressBoth(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Compresses input and returns both Brotli and Gzip variants.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Plugin
member.summary: JellyShim — Performance optimization plugin for Jellyfin.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Plugin.Instance
member.summary: Gets the current plugin instance.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.PluginServiceRegistrator
member.summary: Registers JellyShim services into the Jellyfin DI container. This runs during ConfigureServices, before Build(), so IStartupFilter is consumed.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Tasks.OptimizeAssetsTask
member.summary: Scheduled task that pre-optimizes all web assets at startup and on a daily schedule.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.CssTransformer
member.summary: Applies additional minification to CSS files using NUglify.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.CssTransformer.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.CssTransformer})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.CssTransformer.Minify(System.String)
member.summary: Minifies CSS content. Returns original content if minification fails.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.CssTransformer.MinifyBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Minifies CSS content in a byte array.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.FileTransformationBridge
member.summary: Reflection-based bridge to IAmParadox27's File Transformation plugin. Communicates via reflection across AssemblyLoadContexts — no hard DLL dependency.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.FileTransformationBridge.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.FileTransformationBridge},Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.HtmlTransformer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.FileTransformationBridge.IsRegistered
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the File Transformation plugin was detected and registration succeeded.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.FileTransformationBridge.TryRegister(Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Attempts to detect the File Transformation plugin and register our transformations.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.FileTransformationBridge.TryUnregister
member.summary: Attempts to unregister our transformations from the File Transformation plugin.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.FileTransformationCallback
member.summary: Static callback class invoked by File Transformation plugin via reflection.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.FileTransformationCallback.TransformHtml(System.Object)
member.summary: Callback invoked by File Transformation when index.html is requested. Receives a JObject with "contents" property — accessed via reflection.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.HtmlTransformer
member.summary: Optimizes HTML files using AngleSharp DOM manipulation: modulepreload injection, script defer, SRI stripping, and optional critical CSS.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.HtmlTransformer.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.HtmlTransformer})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.HtmlTransformer.Transform(System.String,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Applies all HTML optimizations.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.HtmlTransformer.TransformBytes(System.Byte[],Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Transforms HTML content from a byte array.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.HtmlTransformer.TransformStream(System.String,System.IO.Stream,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Callback-compatible transform for File Transformation integration. Reads from stream, transforms, writes back.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.HtmlTransformer.MinifyMarkupFormatter
member.summary: Minimal HTML formatter that strips unnecessary whitespace.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.JsTransformer
member.summary: Applies additional minification to JavaScript files using NUglify.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.JsTransformer.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.JsTransformer})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.JsTransformer.Minify(System.String)
member.summary: Minifies JavaScript content. Returns original content if minification fails.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyShim.Transformation.JsTransformer.MinifyBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Minifies JavaScript content in a byte array.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ImagePathRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the ImagePathRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ImagePathRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ImagePathRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ImagePathRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ImagePathRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.ImagePathRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.
